prompt: Create a collage featuring the single child from image 1 alongside the two children from image 2, arranged in a shared dreamlike scene with soft textures and playful hand-drawn elements, evoking a sense of connection and childhood imagination.
prompt_refined: Generate a new image in a collage style. Combine the single child from image 1 (the figure with the purple shirt) with the two children from image 2 (the girl with pigtails and the boy with the blue hat). Position the three children together in the center of a whimsical, dreamlike landscape. The entire scene should feature soft, crayon-like textures and distinctly childlike, hand-drawn outlines, similar to the provided reference images. The composition should convey a feeling of innocent connection and boundless childhood imagination.
objects: A child wearing a purple shirt (from reference image 1)
A girl with pigtails (from reference image 2)
A boy with a blue hat (from reference image 2)
The three children positioned together in the center
